# NIP-84 Reference Card

kind:9802 = highlight event, .content = highlighted text, tags: a/e (nostr events), r (URLs), p (original authors, optional), context (optional), comment (quote highlight, optional). JSON example: { "tags": [["p", "<pubkey-hex>", "<relay-url>", "author"]], "content": "highlighted text" }. Filter pattern: kind:9802, tags: a/e/r/p.
